role_summary: the business valuation consultant provides independent valuation opinions for strategic,  regulatory, and transaction purposes.
responsibilities: • lead valuation engagements for businesses and shares   • determine valuation approach and assumptions   • review financial proje ctions and business plans   • prepare valuation reports for regulatory and transaction use   • support m&a, restructuring, and fundraising activities   • liaise with clients, auditors, and regulators
qualifications: • ca with strong valuation experience   • in-depth knowledge of valuation standards and methods   • client -facing and advisory skills
